prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Early Years National Funding Formula, which applies to all nations of the UK including Scotland. While education funding and delivery differ, the methodologies discussed may be of interest for comparative purposes in early years funding across the UK.
